services.title: Automation that pays for itself
services.subtitle: Every system we ship is built to remove manual work, capture more revenue and run on its own.

items.title: AI Sales Agents (SDR)
items.desc: Autonomous agents that qualify leads, follow up, and book meetings 24/7 across WhatsApp, email and web.

items.title: AI Support Agents
items.desc: Conversational agents that answer customers instantly, resolve tickets and escalate only what matters.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.desc: End-to-end pipelines that connect your CRM, spreadsheets, payments and tools — no copy-paste ever again.

items.title: Custom AI SaaS
items.desc: Niche software products built for your market: real estate, hospitality, agribusiness, automotive and more.

items.title: Lead Generation & Traffic
items.desc: Paid traffic engines wired to automated capture, scoring and nurturing — a predictable pipeline of buyers.

items.title: Dashboards & Reporting
items.desc: Live dashboards and automated reports so you always know what's working — without building a single sheet.

process.title: From bottleneck to autopilot in four steps
process.subtitle: A clear, low-risk path. You always know what you're getting for what you invest.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.desc: We map your bottlenecks and find where AI delivers the fastest return. Free, no commitment.

steps.title: Blueprint
steps.desc: You receive a clear scope: what gets automated, the timeline and the exact investment.

steps.title: Build & Deploy
steps.desc: We build, test and launch your AI systems — integrated with the tools you already use.

steps.title: Scale & Optimize
steps.desc: We monitor, refine and expand. Your automation gets smarter and your costs stay flat.

work.title: Built for the sectors investing the most in AI
work.subtitle: We bring the same playbook — adapted to the metrics, channels and bottlenecks that move each industry.
work.alsoList: Education · Construction · Agribusiness · Restaurants · Marketing Agencies
work.ctaSub: We work with growth-focused businesses across sectors. Tell us about yours.

bullets: AI agent that matches profile to listings

Contracts and documents generated automatically

stack.title: Enterprise-grade tools, agency speed
stack.subtitle: We build on the same technology powering the world's best AI products.

agents.subtitle: Each agent owns one job — and does it without sleeping, calling in sick, or asking for a raise.
agents.anchorBody: Hiring one minimum-wage worker — with payroll taxes, benefits and overhead — easily exceeds what most companies budget for an entire AI stack.
agents.anchorFooter: Now imagine 10 specialists, working in parallel, 24/7, for a fraction of that.

items.name: Paid-Traffic SDR
items.role: Captures and replies to leads from Meta & Google Ads — within seconds.

items.name: Qualifier
items.role: Scores intent, budget and fit before any human gets involved.

items.name: Follow-up Agent
items.role: Re-engages cold leads on the right channel until they reply or opt out.

items.name: Support Agent
items.role: Answers product, pricing and policy questions instantly, 24/7.

items.name: Booking Agent
items.role: Schedules calls and visits straight into your calendar — no back-and-forth.

items.name: Billing Agent
items.role: Smart reminders, recovery of late payments, churn prevention.

items.name: Documents Agent
items.role: Collects, validates and stores client files automatically.

items.name: Reports Agent
items.role: Daily KPIs on WhatsApp — what's working, what's not, what to fix.

items.name: Reactivation Agent
items.role: Win-back flows for past clients and inactive prospects.

items.name: Onboarding Agent
items.role: Greets new clients, gathers info and gets them to first value fast.

pricing.title: Start small. Scale when it pays off.
pricing.subtitle: Each plan combines a one-time setup with a monthly retainer. You only scale once the automation proves its return. Prices in USD — EUR on request.

plans.name: Starter
plans.desc: One AI agent or automation, deployed and running.

plans.name: Growth
plans.desc: A full automation system across your operation.

plans.name: Scale
plans.desc: A tailored AI product or SaaS for your market.

cta.title: Ready to put AI to work?
cta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute automation audit. We'll show you exactly where AI can save time and generate revenue in your business — no pitch, just a plan.
cta.note: No commitment. Available in English & Portuguese.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes. We deliver globally and invoice in USD or EUR. All meetings and documentation are available in English and Portuguese.

items.q: How long does it take to launch?
items.a: A Starter automation typically goes live in 1–2 weeks. Full systems and custom SaaS depend on scope, defined in the blueprint stage.
That's the point. We handle the technology end-to-end. You get a working system and a clear explanation of how it makes you money.

items.q: Do I need to replace my current tools?
items.a: No. We integrate with what you already use — CRM, spreadsheets, WhatsApp, payment tools and more.

wa.prefill: Hi! I'm coming from the Arkai Solutions website and I'd like to know more about your AI automation.

footer.tagline: Autonomous AI systems for companies that want to scale.
footer.built: Building the autonomous future, one business at a time.
